title: indigofera ovina
intro: Indigofera ovina, also known as the Woolly Indigo, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Indigofera ovina include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
